statement: In every magma, Equation 2378 (`x = (y * (z * (x * w))) * z`) implies Equation 2727 (`x = ((y * x) * (z * z)) * w`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0313
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op z (op x w))) z)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y x) (op z z)) w)
